/home/ustczxh/miniconda3/envs/bundlesdf/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fPIC -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/ustczxh/miniconda3/envs/bundlesdf/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/ustczxh/miniconda3/envs/bundlesdf/lib -L/home/ustczxh/miniconda3/envs/bundlesdf/lib  -L/home/ustczxh/miniconda3/envs/bundlesdf/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -L/home/ustczxh/miniconda3/envs/bundlesdf/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs -shared -Wl,-soname,libMY_CUDA_LIB.so -o libMY_CUDA_LIB.so @CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/objects1.rsp CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/cmake_device_link.o @CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/linkLibs.rsp -L"/home/ustczxh/miniconda3/envs/bundlesdf/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/home/ustczxh/miniconda3/envs/bundlesdf/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
